CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK( CreatedBy.Email )), NOT(ISBLANK( CreatedBy.Phone )), NOT(ISBLANK( CreatedBy.MobilePhone )) ), IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_500.gif", "5 Estrellas", 20, 150), IF( AND( NOT(ISBLANK(CreatedBy.Email)), NOT(ISBLANK(CreatedBy.MobilePhone )) ), IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_300.gif", "3 Estrellas", 20, 150), IF( NOT(ISBLANK(CreatedBy.Email)), IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_100.gif", "1 Estrellas", 20, 150), IMAGE("/img/samples/stars_000.gif", "0 Estrellas", 20, 150) ) ) )
CustomField.label: Calidad del contacto
